executives.name: Laura Alber
executives.background: CEO of Williams-Sonoma, Inc. She has served as a Director since 2021.

executives.name: Ronald Kisling
executives.background: Ronald W. Kisling has served as our Chief Financial Officer since August 2021. Prior to joining Fastly, Mr. Kisling served as Chief Financial Officer of Fitbit, Inc., a wearable devices company, from June 2018 to August 2021, and as Fitbit’s Chief Accounting Officer from September 2014 to June 2018.
